living room, couch, window, table, curtains, wooden floor, plant, lamp, pillow, carpet, book, potted plant, rug，no humans, indoors

The image shows a modern living room with a large sectional sofa in the center. The sofa is upholstered in a light brown fabric and has several throw pillows on it. There is a coffee table in front of the sofa with a vase of flowers and a bowl of fruit on top. On the left side of the room, there is a built-in bookshelf with various decorative items. The room has a large window with white blinds, allowing natural light to enter. The floor is covered with a beige area rug, and there are two small side tables on either side. The walls are painted in a dark brown color, and the ceiling has recessed lighting.

The image shows a modern building with a unique architectural design. The building is located next to a body of water, which appears to be a canal or a river. The sky is blue and the sun is setting, casting a warm glow on the building and the surrounding greenery.

The building has multiple levels, with the tallest building on the left and the smallest on the right. The tallest building is made up of multiple levels of glass panels, creating a grid-like pattern. The glass panels are arranged in a way that creates a sense of depth and dimension, while the smaller ones are more angular and have a more modern look. The buildings are surrounded by trees and greenery, and there are a few people visible in the background. The overall atmosphere of the image is peaceful and serene.
